Name: Base64 Encode
Description: Read a file from the staging directory and base64-encode its contents. The encoded string is written to the specified state address. Use this when you explicitly need base64 representation (e.g. embedding in JSON, data URIs).

SettingsInputs.Name: FilePath
SettingsInputs.Description: Path to the file to encode (relative to staging)

SettingsInputs.Name: Destination
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to write the encoded string (optional)
